name: extend-pptx-viewer
title: PowerPoint Viewer
author: Extend UI contributors
description: Renders presentation slides with virtualized thumbnails, keyboard navigation, zoom, upload, and download controls.

changes: Repointed the source-backed thumbnail and responsive sidebar imports to their Taste Blocks install targets.
Replaced the toolbar's physical auto margin with a logical start margin.

notices: Direct dependency licenses are recorded in registry/sources/extend-ui/DEPENDENCIES.md.

modifications.change: Repointed the source-backed thumbnail and responsive sidebar imports to their Taste Blocks install targets. Replaced the toolbar's physical auto margin with a logical start margin.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied viewer install-complete and preserve toolbar alignment in right-to-left documents.
